# mtncloud_resource_pool (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud resource pool by name/code within a group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_resource_pool" "project" {
  name  = "my-project"
  group = "MTNNG_CLOUD_AZ_1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (String) Name of the group the resource pool belongs to.
- `name` (String) Name of the resource pool to look up.

### Read-Only

- `code` (String) Code of the resource pool (e.g. `pool-123`).
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the resource pool.
